description_for_human: Security Copilot plugin for SpyCloud darknet intelligence. Investigate credential exposures, infostealer infections, and compromised identities across Sentinel, Defender XDR, Intune, and Entra ID.
description_for_model:
SpyCloud Threat Intelligence plugin suite for Microsoft Security Copilot. This solution connects to both the SpyCloud REST API and Microsoft Sentinel Log Analytics to provide deep investigation capabilities across dark web credential exposure, infostealer malware infections, compromised corporate and consumer identities, device forensics, stolen session cookies, and identity risk posture. The solution spans 3 integrated plugins:

1. KQL Plugin (90 skills): Queries 10 custom Sentinel tables (SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL, SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL, SpyCloudCompassData_CL, SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL, SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL, SpyCloudSipCookies_CL, SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL, SpyCloudInvestigations_CL, Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL, SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL) covering user investigation, password analysis, breach catalog, Compass consumer identity, UEBA correlation, Fusion multistage detection, cross-connector threat hunting, risk scoring, executive reporting, and automated remediation audit.

2. API Plugin (20 skills): Direct REST API access to SpyCloud Enterprise Breach, Compass Investigation, Identity Exposure, Session Identity Protection (SIP), and Investigations APIs for real-time lookups by email, domain, IP, username, or password.

3. Investigation Agent (17 sub-agents): Autonomous conversational agent orchestrating specialized sub-agents for UEBA behavioral analysis, Fusion multistage attack correlation, TI enrichment & IOC analysis, session cookie & MFA bypass detection, lateral movement tracking, data exfiltration detection, executive summary & compliance reporting, watchlist management, ransomware impact assessment, identity risk scoring, supply chain exposure analysis, dark web monitoring, Defender XDR endpoint analysis, Intune device compliance, CASB cloud app security, and Compass deep infostealer forensics.

The solution integrates with 49 analytics rules, 28 hunting queries, 10 automated remediation playbooks, 3 workbooks, 3 Jupyter notebooks, 4 watchlists, and UEBA/Fusion detection across Microsoft Sentinel.

plugins.name: SpyCloud KQL Plugin
plugins.description: Queries 10 custom SpyCloud tables in Microsoft Sentinel for credential exposure investigation, password analysis, breach catalog, device forensics, remediation audit, and executive reporting.

plugins.name: SpyCloud API Plugin
plugins.auth: API Key (X-API-Key header, per-API keys for IDLINK/DataPartnership/Exposure/CAP)
plugins.description: Direct REST API access to SpyCloud for real-time darknet intelligence lookups across Enterprise, Compass, Identity, SIP, Investigations, IDLINK, Data Partnership, Exposure, and CAP APIs.

plugins.name: SpyCloud Investigation Agent
plugins.auth: None (uses Sentinel workspace connection; optional SpyCloud API key for API-backed skills)
plugins.description: Autonomous conversational investigation agent that orchestrates 17 specialized sub-agents, 6 GPT-4o AI analysis skills, and 35 KQL data retrieval skills for comprehensive darknet threat intelligence investigation across Microsoft Sentinel, Defender XDR, Intune, Entra ID, and CASB. The GPT-4o analysis skills provide AI-powered threat narrative construction, compliance assessment, executive briefing generation, external threat intel correlation, and custom response playbook design.

sub_agents.name: SpyCloudInvestigationAgent
sub_agents.description: Primary orchestrator - triages requests, delegates to sub-agents, synthesizes findings

sub_agents.name: UEBABehavioralAnalysisAgent
sub_agents.description: Correlates credential exposure with UEBA behavioral anomalies

sub_agents.name: FusionMultistageAttackAgent
sub_agents.description: Investigates Fusion-detected multistage attacks involving stolen credentials

sub_agents.name: TIEnrichmentIOCAnalysisAgent
sub_agents.description: Threat intelligence enrichment and IOC analysis for SpyCloud indicators

sub_agents.name: SessionCookieMFABypassAgent
sub_agents.description: Investigates stolen session cookies and MFA bypass attempts

sub_agents.name: LateralMovementInvestigationAgent
sub_agents.description: Tracks lateral movement from compromised credential accounts

sub_agents.name: DataExfiltrationDetectionAgent
sub_agents.description: Detects data theft from compromised accounts via cloud apps and mailbox

sub_agents.name: ExecutiveSummaryComplianceAgent
sub_agents.description: Generates executive reports and compliance assessments

sub_agents.name: WatchlistAssetManagementAgent
sub_agents.description: Manages VIP, IOC, approved domain, and high-value asset watchlists

sub_agents.name: RansomwareImpactAssessmentAgent
sub_agents.description: Assesses ransomware exposure risk from infostealer infections

sub_agents.name: IdentityRiskScoringAgent
sub_agents.description: Calculates composite identity risk scores from multiple data sources

sub_agents.name: SupplyChainExposureAgent
sub_agents.description: Analyzes third-party and supply chain credential exposure

sub_agents.name: DarkWebMonitoringAlertAgent
sub_agents.description: Monitors dark web exposure trends and generates alerts

sub_agents.name: DefenderXDREndpointAgent
sub_agents.description: Cross-correlates with Defender XDR endpoint, identity, email, and cloud app alerts

sub_agents.name: IntuneDeviceComplianceAgent
sub_agents.description: Checks Intune device compliance for infected endpoints

sub_agents.name: CASBCloudAppSecurityAgent
sub_agents.description: Discovers cloud app risk, OAuth abuse, and shadow IT from compromised credentials

sub_agents.name: CompassDeepInvestigationAgent
sub_agents.description: Deep infostealer forensics - stolen cookies, browser data, crypto wallets, C2 infrastructure

ai_analysis_skills.name: AnalyzeAndSummarize
ai_analysis_skills.description: Synthesizes raw KQL data into structured investigation reports with threat assessment, risk scoring, and remediation recommendations

ai_analysis_skills.name: BuildThreatNarrative
ai_analysis_skills.description: Constructs chronological attack narratives from multi-source data with MITRE ATT&CK mapping and kill chain analysis across SpyCloud, Defender, Intune, Entra, and CASB

ai_analysis_skills.name: GenerateComplianceAssessment
ai_analysis_skills.description: Assesses exposure against GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOX, and NIST frameworks with notification obligations and audit-ready documentation

ai_analysis_skills.name: GenerateExecutiveBriefing
ai_analysis_skills.description: Transforms technical findings into board-level executive briefings with business impact, risk quantification, and automation ROI metrics

ai_analysis_skills.name: CorrelateExternalThreatIntel
ai_analysis_skills.description: Enriches SpyCloud IOCs with malware family analysis, threat actor attribution, C2 infrastructure patterns, and actionable blocking recommendations

ai_analysis_skills.name: DesignResponsePlaybook
ai_analysis_skills.description: Designs custom incident response playbooks with decision trees, API call specifications, escalation criteria, and Logic App integration guidance

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
custom_tables.description: Enterprise Breach API watchlist - compromised credentials, PII, device forensics, passwords, infostealer artifacts

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
custom_tables.description: Breach catalog metadata - title, description, category, record counts, confidence scores, malware family

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassData_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass deep infostealer records - stolen cookies, browser autofill, crypto wallets, installed software, C2 infrastructure

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass infected device fingerprints - hostname, OS, IPs, infection timeline, application counts

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass application targets - URLs, domains, credential/cookie counts per infected machine

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudSipCookies_CL
custom_tables.description: Stolen session cookies by domain - cookie name/value/expiration, secure/httpOnly flags, infection context

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL
custom_tables.description: Identity exposure profiles - deduplicated credential risk posture per identity with severity scoring

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudInvestigations_CL
custom_tables.description: Investigations API - full database searches across breaches, infostealers, phishing, paste sites, combo lists

custom_tables.name: Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
custom_tables.description: MDE remediation audit log - device isolation, tagging, IOC actions (internal, not API-sourced)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
custom_tables.description: CA remediation audit log - password resets, session revocations, CA group assignments (internal, not API-sourced)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudIdLink_CL
custom_tables.description: IDLINK identity correlation - unified identity graphs, linked accounts/devices/credentials across breaches
custom_tables.requires: IDLINK API entitlement (enableIdLink, separate API key)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudDataPartnership_CL
custom_tables.description: Partner-contributed darknet intelligence from trusted data sharing partnerships
custom_tables.requires: Data Partnership API entitlement (enableDataPartnership, separate API key)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudExposure_CL
custom_tables.description: Aggregated exposure risk assessments with scoring, timeline analysis, and remediation recommendations
custom_tables.requires: Exposure API entitlement (enableExposure, separate API key)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCAP_CL
custom_tables.description: Credential Access Program - automated credential protection policies, resets, and lifecycle management
custom_tables.requires: CAP API entitlement (enableCAP, separate API key)

sentinel_integration.playbook_deployment: Templates (deploy from Sentinel > Automation > Playbook Templates)
sentinel_integration.workbook_deployment: Separate focused workbooks (one per data source, not multi-tab)

spycloud_apis: Enterprise Breach API (shared key with Compass)
Compass Investigation API (shared key with Enterprise)

setup_instructions:
## Security Copilot Plugin Installation

IMPORTANT: Do NOT upload this manifest.json to Security Copilot. Upload the individual YAML plugin files instead.

### Step 1: Install the KQL Plugin (No API Key Required)
1. In Security Copilot: Sources > Manage plugins > Custom > Add plugin
2. Upload format: **Security Copilot plugin**
3. Upload file: `SpyCloud_Plugin.yaml`
4. Configure settings when prompted:
   - TenantId: Your Azure AD tenant ID
   - SubscriptionId: Azure subscription containing Sentinel
   - ResourceGroupName: Resource group containing Sentinel workspace
   - WorkspaceName: Log Analytics workspace name
5. No API key needed — uses your Sentinel workspace connection

### Step 2: Install the API Plugin (SpyCloud API Key Required)
1. In Security Copilot: Sources > Manage plugins > Custom > Add plugin
2. Upload format: **Security Copilot plugin**
3. Upload file: `SpyCloud_API_Plugin.yaml`
4. When prompted for API Key authentication, enter your SpyCloud API key as the Value
5. The plugin automatically sends it as the X-API-Key header
6. Get your API key: Log in to portal.spycloud.com > Account Settings > API Keys

### Step 3: Install the Investigation Agent (No API Key Required)
1. In Security Copilot: Sources > Manage plugins > Custom > Add plugin
2. Upload format: **Security Copilot plugin**
3. Upload file: `SpyCloud_Agent.yaml`
4. Configure settings: TenantId, SubscriptionId, ResourceGroupName, WorkspaceName

### SpyCloud API Endpoints Used
The API Plugin connects to https://api.spycloud.io with these endpoints:

| API | Endpoint | Description |
|-----|----------|-------------|
| Breach by Email | /enterprise-v2/breach/data/emails/{email} | Credentials exposed for a specific email |
| Breach by Domain | /enterprise-v2/breach/data/emails?domain={domain} | All exposures for a corporate domain |
| Breach by IP | /enterprise-v2/breach/data/ips/{ip} | Exposures associated with an IP address |
| Breach by Username | /enterprise-v2/breach/data/usernames/{username} | Exposures for a specific username |
| Password Check | /enterprise-v2/breach/data/passwords | Check if a password appears in breaches |
| Breach Catalog | /enterprise-v2/breach/catalog | Browse all breach sources |
| Breach Catalog Entry | /enterprise-v2/breach/catalog/{id} | Details for a specific breach |
| Compass by Email | /compass/data/emails/{email} | Deep infostealer data for an email |
| Compass by Domain | /compass/data/emails?domain={domain} | Infostealer data for a domain |
| Compass by IP | /compass/data/ips/{ip} | Infostealer data for an IP |
| Identity Exposure | /enterprise-v2/breach/data/emails/{email}?type=corporate | Identity exposure profile |
| Identity Watchlist | /enterprise-v2/breach/data/watchlist?type=corporate | Full watchlist exposure data |
| SIP Cookies | /sip/breach/data/cookie-domains/{domain} | Stolen session cookies by domain |
| SIP Catalog | /sip/breach/catalog | SIP breach catalog |
| SIP Catalog Entry | /sip/breach/catalog/{id} | SIP breach details |
| Investigate Email | /investigations-v2/data/emails/{email} | Full database search by email |
| Investigate Domain | /investigations-v2/data/emails?domain={domain} | Full database search by domain |
| Investigate IP | /investigations-v2/data/ips/{ip} | Full database search by IP |
| Investigate Username | /investigations-v2/data/usernames/{username} | Full database search by username |
| Investigate Password | /investigations-v2/data/passwords | Full database search by password |

### API Authentication
All SpyCloud API endpoints use the X-API-Key header for authentication.
Test your key: curl -H 'X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY' https://api.spycloud.io/enterprise-v2/breach/catalog?limit=1

### API Tiers
- Enterprise: Breach Watchlist, Breach Catalog, Identity Exposure (included with all subscriptions)
- Enterprise+: Compass Data, Compass Devices, Compass Applications (requires Compass entitlement)
- SIP: Session Identity Protection cookies (requires SIP entitlement)
- Investigations: Full database search (requires Investigations entitlement)

### Required Permissions
- KQL Plugin: Reader access to the Sentinel Log Analytics workspace
- API Plugin: Valid SpyCloud API key (Enterprise or Enterprise+ tier)
- Agent: Reader access to Sentinel workspace
- Playbooks: Managed identity permissions for Microsoft Graph, MDE, and Sentinel APIs
